code: import React,{createContext,useEffect,useMemo,useState}from'react';import blogService from'../services/blogService';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const BlogContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);export const BlogProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[blogs,setBlogs]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchBlogs=async()=>{try{const allBlogs=await blogService.fetchBlogs();const publishedBlogs=(allBlogs||[]).filter(b=>b.status==='published');setBlogs(publishedBlogs);}catch(error){console.warn('Unable to load blogs from backend.');}};fetchBlogs();},[]);const addBlog=blog=>{setBlogs(prev=>[...prev,blog]);};const updateBlog=(slug,updates)=>{setBlogs(prev=>prev.map(item=>item.slug===slug?{...item,...updates}:item));};const removeBlog=slug=>{setBlogs(prev=>prev.filter(item=>item.slug!==slug));};const value=useMemo(()=>({blogs,addBlog,updateBlog,removeBlog}),[blogs]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BlogContext.Provider,{value:value,children:children});};
